message:
fix(clippy): resolve warnings across 56 files in test and library code

Addresses redundant clones, Duration readability, single-char patterns,
len_zero comparisons, format string improvements, approx_constant,
redundant field names, and items-after-statements warnings. Also adds
targeted tests in channel/{mpsc,oneshot,watch} and net/http modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -69,10 +69,8 @@ sqlite = ["dep:rusqlite"]
 postgres = []
 # Enable MySQL async client with wire protocol.
 mysql = []
-# QUIC and HTTP/3 features removed (bd-9ipp): quinn/h3/h3-quinn
-# unconditionally depend on tokio, which conflicts with this custom
-# async runtime. Source code is preserved behind dead feature gates.
-# Re-enable when a tokio-free QUIC stack is available.
+# QUIC/HTTP3 feature flags are intentionally not exposed here yet.
+# Native Tokio-free transport work is tracked under `net::quic_core`.
 # Enable Kafka client integration via rdkafka.
 kafka = ["dep:rdkafka"]
 # Enable unsafe AVX2/NEON intrinsics for ~8x GF(256) throughput in RaptorQ.
@@ -159,7 +157,8 @@ rusqlite = { version = "0.38", features = ["bundled"], optional = true }
 sha2 = "0.10"
 # HMAC for Macaroon capability token verification (bd-2lqyk.2)
 hmac = "0.12"
-# QUIC/HTTP3 deps removed (bd-9ipp): quinn/h3/h3-quinn depend on tokio.
+# QUIC/HTTP3 deps remain disabled: current upstream stacks pull Tokio transitively.
+# We will replace this surface with native asupersync implementations.
 # quinn = { version = "0.11", default-features = false, features = ["rustls", "runtime-smol"], optional = true }
 # h3 = { version = "0.0.8", optional = true }
 # h3-quinn = { version = "0.0.10", optional = true }

@@ -274,7 +274,7 @@ It maps common Tokio ecosystem crates to the corresponding Asupersync modules.
 | TLS | `tokio-rustls`, `native-tls` | `src/tls/` (`tls`, `tls-native-roots`, `tls-webpki-roots`) | Feature-gated | Active | Mixed | Medium |
 | WebSocket | `tokio-tungstenite` | `src/net/websocket/` | Built-in | Active | Mixed | Medium |
 | HTTP stack (HTTP/1.1 + HTTP/2) | `hyper`, `h2`, `http-body`, `hyper-util` | `src/http/h1/`, `src/http/h2/`, `src/http/body.rs`, `src/http/pool.rs` | Built-in | Active | Mixed | Medium |
-| QUIC + HTTP/3 | `quinn`, `h3`, `h3-quinn` | `src/net/quic/`, `src/http/h3/` (source present; `quic` / `http3` features currently not exposed in `Cargo.toml`) | In progress | Parked | N/A | High |
+| QUIC + HTTP/3 | `quinn`, `h3`, `h3-quinn` | `src/net/quic/`, `src/http/h3/` (native-only rewrite in progress; not exposed as features in `Cargo.toml`) | In progress | Parked | N/A | High |
 | Web framework | `axum`, `warp`, `tower-http` | `src/web/`, `src/service/`, `src/server/` | In progress | Active | Mixed | Medium |
 | gRPC | `tonic` + `prost` + `tower` + `hyper` | `src/grpc/` | Built-in | Active | Mixed | Medium |
 | Database clients | `tokio-postgres`, `mysql_async`, `sqlx` | `src/database/{postgres,mysql,sqlite}.rs` | Feature-gated | Active | Mixed | Medium |
